TABLE II CROSS-VENDOR OPERATOR COMPATIBILITY FOR 17 VFI OPERATORS AT 1080P. LATENCY NORMALIZED TO CONV 3×3 = 1.0×. “FREQ”: METHODS USING THE OPERATOR (OUT OF 9 SURVEYED). GROUPS: (A) UNIVERSAL, (B) PARTIAL, (C) LIMITED, (D) ITERATIVE PATTERNS.

TABLE V QUALITY AND DEPLOYMENT STATUS ON VIMEO90K AND XIPH 1080P. BOLD: BEST AMONG DEPLOYABLE METHODS. FOR CONTEXT, NON-DEPLOYABLE METHODS REACH 35–36 DB ON VIMEO90K (IFRNET [2] 35.80, AMT-S [3] 35.72, EMA-VFI [6] 36.11).

Fig. 4. Quality scaling with model capacity. Basic prealignment (dashed) and smoothed prealignment (solid) series both scale without saturation. Dashed horizontal lines show RIFE HDv3 (3.04M) and NAFNet ceiling (17.1M, smoothed prealignment retrained) as reference points.
